description: Worked complaint scenarios with branch, tier, templates, and log row.

examples.context: Vending: customer email, product tasted stale, $1.50
examples.resolution: Refund $1.50 via Venmo + check machine date on that coil

examples.context: Vending: machine took money, no vend, angry phone call
examples.resolution: Remote vend or refund same day + tech ticket for MDB

examples.context: Google review threat after missed restock at office location
examples.resolution: Same-day restock + credit for next purchase
examples.notes: No review removal bargain. Fix first.

examples.context: Cafe: wrong order, line behind customer, in person
examples.resolution: Remake order, comp drink, move to side counter

examples.context: ALL CAPS email, third contact, promised callback never happened
examples.resolution: Owner call within 4h + remedy above medium tier
examples.log_row: 2026-07-07,email,C-505,service,nuclear,missed callback x2,staff no log,owner remedy+process fix,Y,2026-07-08,N,owner

examples.context: Customer wants refund outside policy window
examples.resolution: Policy explained + credit on next order (not full refund)

examples.context: Same customer, second complaint in 60 days, same root cause
examples.resolution: Manager remedy + ops fix on root cause tagged in log
examples.log_row: 2026-07-09,phone,C-442,service,nuclear,repeat stale product,coil not rotated,manager remedy+coil SOP,Y,2026-07-10,Y,manager
